content.en:
"Now that my cultivation has reached the limit of my current level, which path should I take?"

Ye Tian muttered.

He was clearly abandoning the third path, and there were only two paths: the awakening of the Origin Ancestor on the other side and breaking the boundary of the Origin Origin.

But both paths are flawed!

He has always been in pursuit of perfection, and naturally wants to follow a path of perfection.

"Maybe I can try to create a whole new path, combining the first path with the second path. Ye Tian thought to himself.

It would be very dangerous to study like this, but he could study it one by one.

However, he had to understand both paths first, and he had to go through them all before researching them.

Thereupon.

Ye Tian first collected a secret medicine recipe and saw how these secret medicines could help him complete the awakening of the Origin Ancestor on the other side, so that he could conduct research.

Subsequently.

And that's what he did.

And the secret medicine is very precious, especially the formula of the awakening secret medicine with few defects, it is even more rare.

But.

Ye Tian is just researching, and he doesn't need to care about the life and death of the copy body and the sequelae, even if it is a very flawed secret medicine formula, he needs it.

Therefore, he didn't care about the defects and sequelae of the Awakening Elixir, and it was easy to trade.

this day.

Ye Tian traded an awakening secret medicine in the hands of an Origin Upper Realm overlord, called the Phantom Flame Secret Medicine, this secret medicine is very spicy, only one in twentieth of the success rate, and it is only the first time to use the best effect, if you use it later, the effect is more and more spicy chicken, and the injuries to the body are also very terrifying.

Even if you use this Phantom Flame Elixir to complete the first awakening of the Origin Ancestor on the other side, it will be extremely difficult to complete the second awakening in the future, and you may stay at the level of the first awakening for the rest of your life.

So.

The Phantom Flame Elixir is known as the most rubbish secret elixir, and many Origin Upper Realm Overlords have formulas in their hands, at most they are used for research, but they don't dare to really configure the Phantom Flame Secret Elixir and take it themselves to break through the awakening, which is simply ruining their own past.

In doing so, it is better to choose the third path!

Ye Tian didn't care about copying his body, so he dared to use the Phantom Flame Secret Medicine.

"It's not too rare for this kind of secret medicine to require resources!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Over the years, he has found a lot of resources, and he has countless resources and materials on his body, and he happens to have all the materials he needs.

Subsequently, he began to use these resource materials to refine the Phantom Flame Elixir.

Even if it is a very spicy chicken phantom flame secret medicine, it is not very easy to refine it successfully.

Ye Tian refined for the first time, but failed, and then started refining for the second time.

As a result, it failed again.

Thereupon.

He refined again and again, and finally when he was refining for the fourth time, he successfully refined a phantom flame secret medicine.

"It's successful, but once the Phantom Flame Secret Elixir is definitely not enough, you must prepare more Phantom Flame Secret Medicine!"

As a result, he refined again and again, and the refining level was getting better and better.

Gradually, there were more and more phantom fire elixirs on his body.

Finally, he had gathered dozens of elixirs.

"You can carry out the awakening cultivation of the Origin Ancestor on the other side!"

He took out a Phantom Flame Elixir, then swallowed it in one gulp, and activated the Reincarnation Haotian Body to absorb the energy of the Phantom Flame Elixir.

Rumble!!!!

Countless energies poured into the body of Reincarnation Haotian, and his body also produced unimaginable pain, as if his whole body was about to be torn into countless pieces.

"It really hurts!"

Ye Tian still forcibly held back and didn't make a sound.

With the passage of time, except for the pain, the body of reincarnation Haotian has not changed at all.

Apparently, his awakening failed.

But this replica body is already full of holes, and more importantly, the foundation of this replica body is seriously damaged, and there are many problems with the body of reincarnation Haotian, and the power is far less than before.

"The body damage to this replica is too severe to be repaired. "

Only then did he understand how big the flaws of this Phantom Flame Secret Elixir were, and if it was given to other Origin Upper Realm Overlords, that life would be almost useless.

Subsequently.

He continued to change to a replica body, and then took the Phantom Flame Elixir.

As a result, this time it was still a failure.

He is not in a hurry, he uses the copy body to take the Phantom Flame Secret Pill again and again to make breakthroughs, and every time he fails, he will sum up some experience.

At the twenty-sixth time, Ye Tian's luck was relatively good, and he finally succeeded.

Rumble!!!!!

Ye Tian's copied body began to transform, strictly speaking, the body of reincarnation Haotian began to transform, and an incomparably powerful energy was generated in the depths of the body of reincarnation Haotian, and an incomparably terrifying reincarnation true body appeared behind him.

Fortunately, he had already prepared for it, he tried it in the ruins of reincarnation, and used the formation to seal the void, so that he would not be discovered.

If you try to break through on Wind Tooth Island, such a movement will definitely be discovered, and it will be difficult to study at that time.

Now.

He was immersed in the first awakening of the reincarnation of Haotian's body, and he continued to perceive, and gradually understood more and more about the awakening.

Before, no matter how much he listened to the experience of other Origin Upper Realm Overlords and inquired about relevant information, he was not as good as the experience of breaking through himself.

"It turns out that this is the awakening of the Origin Ancestor!"

At this moment, the body of reincarnation Haotian after awakening is absorbing the origin of the other side, making the body stronger and stronger, but the origin of the other side is getting weaker and weaker.

In the end, half of the other side origin was absorbed by the body of reincarnation Haotian.

"It's only once that the Origin Ancestor of the Other Shore awakens, and half of the Origin of the Other Shore is consumed, if it awakens once or twice, the Origin of the Other Shore will be completely shattered and integrated into the Origin Ancestor of the Other Shore!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

Therefore, once you have taken this path, it will be difficult to preserve the origin of the other side.

In the following years, he carefully comprehended the reincarnation of Haotian after awakening, and became more and more aware of this awakening.

Afterwards.

He directly annihilated this replica body, and if he really wanted to copy it, he could copy it at any time.

After that, he was ready to start taking the second path to try, so as to complete the other side of the origin and break the boundary for the first time.

However, it is more difficult to break the boundaries of the origin of the other side, create your own method, or research a special secret medicine to break the boundary, but the secret medicine that can break the boundary of the origin of the other side is extremely rare, and most of them still break through with your own method.
